fast_hadamard_transform_kernel (Hadamard rotation) -- ~4.1 us

Sinc

Apply the extension after build_route

vllm.title: [Perf] Triton fast path for small CPU→GPU `swap_blocks_batch` in the offloading connector
vllm.author: Etelis
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
OffloadingConnector copies KV between host and device via
cuMemcpyBatchAsync. That call saturates PCIe for large contiguous copies,
but on the CPU→GPU (onload / "read") direction it collapses for small
per-descriptor payloads — the regime KV offload actually runs in. This PR adds
a small Tri

vllm.title: [Rust Frontend] Add /server_info to Rust frontend
vllm.author: Xunzhuo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Adds /server_info to the Rust HTTP frontend alongside the existing /version route.
The endpoint follows the Python frontend's top-level response shape with vllm_config, vllm_env, and system_env. It returns a text config snapshot by default and supports ?config_format=json for structured conf

Enable TritonFp8BlockScaledMMKernel.is_supported() on XPU (in addition to CUDA-like).

vllm.title: [Refactor] Suppress SyntaxWarning from ast.literal_eval in tool parsers
vllm.author: sfeng33
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Python 3.12+ emits SyntaxWarning for invalid escape sequences (e.g. \p in C:\path). LLM-generated tool call arguments can contain these, producing noisy warnings in server logs. This PR suppress the warning by using safe_literal_eval().
